title: What is the Ultimate Kayak Trip

transcript.text: Hello and welcome to the Ultimate Kayak Trip.
This is just a quick introduction.
What is the Ultimate Kayak Trip?
It is the Ultimate Kayak Trip.
The Ultimate Trip.
It's from Miami to Trinidad and back.
All by kayak.
Doesn't sound like fun.
It goes from Miami to Bimini.
Bimini to Andros, Bahamas.
Andros to the Sound.
It's out on the Eximates with these tiny little islands.
And then where the ocean is only like 10 feet deep.
And then Long Island, Turks.
And then down into Dominican Republic over to Puerto Rico.
The Virgin Islands and the Eastern Antilles on down to Trinidad.
It's only like 30 miles between the islands.
Some of the crossings are bigger like 90 miles.
I think it's kind of against the current though on the way down there.
So it might, you know, be hard.
We might be out there like a week paddling.
But the idea behind it is what I will speak about and the why.
So that was what.
Goodbye.
